, with the OPC associate having the most competitive compensation, falling above the 75
VPs alignment is falling between the 25
Talent Acquisition feedback suggests base salary is a key driver of attrition, indicating an opportunity to rebalance pay mix.
, with the Director aligned to the 25
percentile, and the VP far below the 25
A 10% premium has been applied to the survey OPC Manager, In-House Marketing Manager and Marketing Director roles to reflect a blend of Manager/Senior Manager and Director/Senior Director levels.
A 20% discount has been added to the VP of Sales and Marketing survey position to reflect responsibilities for only Marketing at HGV.
Vice President of Sales and Marketing
